name: Steps
description: Numbered step indicator for wizards and progress flows.

api.name: Steps
api.description: Numbered step indicator for wizards and progress flows.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: When true, enables opt-in motion: the current step's indicator pulses, connector lines draw in on advance, and retract on reverse. Default is false (no animation, original behaviour).

records.name: StepsContext
records.signature: StepsContext(int CurrentStep, bool Clickable, EventCallback<int> OnStepClick, StepsOrientation Orientation, bool Animated, StepsDirection Direction, int ReplayKey, Steps Parent)

examples.title: Basic Steps
examples.code:
<Steps CurrentStep="1">
    <StepsItem Title="Account" Description="Create your account" />
    <StepsItem Title="Profile" Description="Set up your profile" />
    <StepsItem Title="Complete" Description="All done" />
</Steps>

examples.title: Vertical Steps
examples.code:
<Steps CurrentStep="2" Orientation="Steps.StepsOrientation.Vertical">
    <StepsItem Title="Sign Up" Description="Create an account" />
    <StepsItem Title="Verify Email" Description="Confirm your email" />
    <StepsItem Title="Set Password" Description="Choose a password" />
    <StepsItem Title="Done" Description="Start using the app" />
</Steps>

examples.title: Orientation (interactive)
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_orientation">
    <SegmentedItem Value="@Steps.StepsOrientation.Horizontal">Horizontal</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@Steps.StepsOrientation.Vertical">Vertical</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>
<Steps CurrentStep="1" Orientation="@_orientation">
    <StepsItem Title="Account" Description="Create your account" />
    <StepsItem Title="Profile" Description="Set up your profile" />
    <StepsItem Title="Payment" Description="Add billing info" />
    <StepsItem Title="Done" Description="All finished" />
</Steps>

@code { private Steps.StepsOrientation _orientation = Steps.StepsOrientation.Horizontal; }

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

mdSummary:
# Steps

Numbered step indicator for wizards and progress flows.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Lists & Trees
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/steps

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Steps | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Steps | CurrentStep | `int` | `` |  |
| Steps | CurrentStepChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` |  |
| Steps | Clickable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Steps | Orientation | `StepsOrientation` | `StepsOrientation.Horizontal` |  |
| Steps | Animated | `bool` | `` | When true, enables opt-in motion: the current step's indicator pulses, connector lines draw in on advance, and retract on reverse. Default is false (no animation, original behaviour). |
| Steps | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Steps | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| StepsItem | Context | `Steps.StepsContext?` | `` |  |
| StepsItem | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepsItem | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepsItem | Status | `StepsItemStatus` | `StepsItemStatus.Default` |  |
| StepsItem | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| StepsItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepsItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Steps) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (StepsItem) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

## Events
- `CurrentStepChanged` (`EventCallback<int>`)

## Sub-components
- `StepsItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Steps.StepsContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Steps />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Steps/Steps.razor`
- `UI/Steps/StepsItem.razor`
